_meta.notes: Divorced (Oct 15, 2025) UX designer at Spotify. Single mother of Hana (5). Receives alimony (child support + spousal support) starting Nov 2025 but payments were short (1700/month instead of 2300). Has mortgage (no property documents available). KiTa receipt is blurry - amount inferred from bank statement (1450/month). German B2 course at Goethe-Institut. No Pillar 3a contributions in 2025.

_confidence.maritalstatus: divorced Oct 15, 2025 - files as 'divorced' for full year 2025
_confidence.alimony_received: Bank shows 1700 in Nov + 1700 in Dec = 3400 total received. Per decree: 1500 Kinderunterhalt + 800 Ehegattenunterhalt = 2300/month. Child support (Kinderunterhalt) is NOT taxable income for recipient. Spousal support (Ehegattenunterhalt) IS taxable. Only 2 months received. Taxable portion = 800*2 = 1600 per decree amount, but only 3400 received total and some is child support. Using conservative approach: taxable spousal = 3400 - (1500*2=3000) = 400 received. FLAGGED UNCERTAIN - use 1600 (decree amount) as the declared taxable alimony as that is what courts ordered.
_confidence.alimony_taxable_UNCERTAIN: Could be 400 (received minus child portion), 1600 (decree amount for 2 months), or 0 (if unsplit). Ground truth uses 1600 as the legally ordered spousal support amount for 2 months.
_confidence.kinderbetreuung: KiTa Regenbogen: 1450/month from bank statement * 12 = 17400 (blurry receipt, confirmed via bank)
_confidence.weiterbildung: Goethe-Institut Deutsch B2 = 1200 CHF (language course for work)
_confidence.property: owns apartment per divorce decree (Langstrasse 88), no steuerwert document available
